name: TELVAS 40 TAB 1*15
description: A blood pressure-lowering medicine containing telmisartan used for treating high blood pressure and reducing heart attack/stroke risk.
uses: Prevention of heart attack and stroke
dosage: Swallow it whole without chewing or breaking. It can be taken with or without food, but it's best to take it at the same time each day.
storageInstructions: Store it in the original packaging to protect it from sunlight and moisture. Keep out of sight and reach of children.

name: WYSOLONE 5 TAB
description: Steroid tablet containing prednisolone used to treat allergies, inflammation, and autoimmune disorders.
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; swallow whole with water; do not cut, break, or chew; consistent timing recommended; do not exceed prescribed dose.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C; keep in original packaging to prevent moisture; store out of children's reach.

name: DEXONA TAB 1*20
description: A steroidal medication containing dexamethasone used to treat inflammatory conditions, allergies, and autoimmune disorders.
dosage: Take Dexona tablet regularly as directed by the doctor. The medicine must be taken with food or after food. It must be swallowed entirely with a sufficient amount of liquid.
storageInstructions: Store it at room temperature and away from moisture. Keep it out of reach of children and pets.
